title: praxelis decumbens
intro: Praxelis decumbens, also known as the creeping praxelis or creeping fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's medicinal properties have been linked to several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing relief from fever and respiratory issues. Praxelis decumbens can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
